message:
perf+a11y(wills-estate): per-viz skeleton heights, motion-safe pulses, webpack test lane

Linter applied:
- viz-error-boundary: per-viz min-height map (34-40rem) for tighter CLS
  reservation instead of a generic 300px
- article: pulse dots → motion-safe:animate-pulse + aria-hidden
- metadata: "attorney-ready handoff package" → "structured handoff packet
  for attorney review" (consistent with article softening)
- playwright.config: switch test lane to webpack to avoid turbopack DB
  corruption under repeated Playwright spins

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -314,7 +314,10 @@ export function WillsEstateArticle() {
{/* Badge */}
- + AI Agents · Estate Planning · Skills
@@ -594,7 +597,10 @@ export function WillsEstateArticle() {
- +

What shipped in the latest release · April 2026

@@ -61,7 +61,10 @@ export default defineConfig({
 
   /* Run your local dev server before starting the tests */
   webServer: {
-    command: "bun dev",
+    // Turbopack has intermittently corrupted its task DB under repeated
+    // Playwright-driven dev-server spins in this repo, so keep the test lane
+    // on webpack until the underlying issue is resolved.
+    command: "bun run dev -- --webpack",
     url: "http://localhost:3000",
     reuseExistingServer: !process.env.CI,
     timeout: 120 * 1000,
